calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-22-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-12-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: George McNitt appeared by zoom for Martial York (petitioner).

Mr. McNitt presented oral argument to support his position as to why the estate funds do not need to be in fully FDIC insured accounts. The court noted that this issue had been addressed by Judge Quinn in another case, and that Judge Quinn had informed counsel that if this happened again the court would order full bond. The court also noted that Mr. McNitt's client is the sole beneficiary and informed Mr. McNitt that in the future if his clients' accounts are not in FDIC accounts, other actions will be taken. The First and Final Report of Executor on Waiver of Account, etc. is under submission with the court's intent to allow, but not approve the final report.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Pliego. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-08-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: George McNitt, in court, for and with Martial York, Petitioner.

The court confirms with Petitioner the names of the Decedent's parents as Bernice Moore, mother, and Glanville Smith, father, and confirms that Decedent's mother died in 2006. Petitioner is not certain of the year that Decedent's father died but confirms that it was prior to April of 2022. After additional discussion, the court confirms that no one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Aug-01-2008 is admitted to probate. Martial R. York is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Nov-22-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Maloney. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-13-2022 Continued To Nov-08-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
